Carbopol® and Noveon® rheology modifiers for sun care
Film formers for water-resistance in sunscreen products

notes: US-based specialty chemicals company offering a broad range of co-ingredients and formulation aids for sun care products. Ashland's Escalol® UV booster systems enhance SPF performance, while their Carbopol® and Noveon® polymers provide rheology control critical for sun care stability. Particularly valuable as a one-stop formulation support supplier for sunscreen development, offering film formers, sensory modifiers, and emulsification aids compatible with all major UV filter systems.
